defaults.text: Hi, I want to test the emulator.

errors.simulateFailed: The test emulator simulation could not be executed.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to access the test environment.
errors.capabilitiesLoad: The test emulator capabilities could not be loaded.
errors.runDetail: The run details could not be loaded.

hero.description: First operational cut of the enterprise environment. This panel already triggers an input by reusing the real webhook runtime, the chatbot router, the flow engine, and the node executors.
hero.status: Initial state: real runtime + input simulation.

appliedChanges.title: Applied changes
appliedChanges.description: This emulator already includes the operational outboundMetaMock toggle in both backend and UI.
items: Capabilities returns the real value per company.
The emulator runtime uses the flag to avoid outbound calls to Meta when enabled.
The emulator UI allows enabling and disabling outboundMetaMock.
The admin API client already supports per-company capabilities and settings updates.

simulate.title: Simulate input
simulate.messagePlaceholder: Write the content to inject into the real runtime
simulate.superAdminTenant: Active company from the global selector:
simulate.sessionTenant: The company is resolved from your JWT session.
simulate.runtimeLaunched: Execution launched against the real runtime.

runs.title: Recent runs
runs.empty: There are no runs for this phone in the active company yet.

capabilities.title: Capabilities
capabilities.outboundMetaMockDescription: When enabled, the emulator does not call Meta for outbound messages.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.replayDescription: Replays the selected run using the stored input events.
timeline.replayUnavailable: This run does not have replayable user inputs.
timeline.complianceDescription: Evaluates whether the run meets the minimum traceability and response checks.
timeline.selectRun: Select a run to inspect its timeline.
